All 6 capture files present: requirements-capture.yaml, design-capture.yaml, implementation-capture.yaml, review-capture.yaml, testing-capture.yaml, deployment-capture.yaml.

summary: 10/10 assertions passed. Full cycle verified: 16-level traceability chain (784 links, 0 orphans), 6/6 KC files (68 learnings), 6/6 QG files (all PASS), state valid, retrospective with 12 prevention rules.
